vulnerabilities.title: Prototype Pollution in lodash
vulnerabilities.description: Prototype Pollution in lodash allows an attacker to inject properties into existing JavaScript language construct prototypes.

vulnerabilities.title: Django SQL Injection via Truncator
vulnerabilities.description: Django contains a SQL injection vulnerability in the Truncator class. An attacker could craft input that results in arbitrary SQL execution.

vulnerabilities.title: Server-Side Request Forgery in axios
vulnerabilities.description: Axios allows Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) via the URL parser when processing certain redirects.
